# Copilot Coding Agent Instructions

## Repository Overview
- Minimal placeholder repository with only `README.md`; no application code or dependencies are present yet.
- Keep changes tightly scoped to the specific request.

## Development Workflow
- Use small, focused branches/PRs and avoid unrelated edits.
- Update `README.md` when you add new functionality or commands.

## Build & Test
- No build, lint, or test tooling exists yet. If you introduce code, add targeted tests and document how to run them.
- Rerun any tests you add before finishing work.

## Code Style
- Prefer simple, explicit changes; avoid large refactors.
- Stick to plain Markdown/ASCII and avoid adding dependencies unless required by the request.

## Security & Secrets
- Never commit secrets, tokens, or credentials. Keep configuration values out of the repo.

## Validation
- Manually verify your changes satisfy the request. Note when no tests were run because none exist.
